description_long: This is a hand tool with a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a large, heavy, wedge-shaped metal head. The head is affixed to the handle with visible metal fasteners, and the striking face is broad and flat, suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle features a textured grip area, likely for improved handling and control during use. The metal head appears dark and matte, with a utilitarian, functional design rather than decorative elements. The tool shows a utilitarian construction, typical for heavy-duty tasks such as chopping or splitting. There are no visible brand markings or decorative features, emphasizing its practical, work-oriented nature.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a curved wooden handle and a large, wedge-shaped metal head secured by metal fasteners. The handle has a textured grip for better control.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the end of the handle, showing the cylindrical shape and the alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal head attached with fasteners.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the top of the head, highlighting the circular end and the pointed alignment of the head.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the other profile of the handle and the head, with the wedge shape clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a textured grip area, likely for ergonomic handling and improved control.
attribute_head_type: Wedge-shaped steel head, broad and flat on the striking face, secured with visible metal fasteners; resembles a hatchet or splitting maul head.
